id.description: The unique identifier of the AWS CodeCatalyst development environment.

ides.description: A list of Integrated Development Environments (IDEs) available in the development environment, including their names and runtime versions.

inactivity_timeout_minutes.description: The number of minutes the development environment remains active without activity before timing out.

instance_type.description: The type of instance used for the development environment, indicating its computational resources.

last_updated_time.description: The timestamp of the last update made to the development environment.

persistent_storage.description: Details about the persistent storage attached to the development environment, including its size in gigabytes.

status.description: The current status of the development environment, such as active or inactive.

status_reason.description: A descriptive reason or message explaining the current status of the development environment.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs used to tag the development environment for identification or organization purposes.
